code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut nums = [0, 0]
mut idx = 0
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    if not in_num
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      in_num = true
    end
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    in_num = true
    cur = 0
    sign = -1
  else
    if in_num
      if idx == 0
        nums = [cur * sign, 0]
      else
        nums = [nums[0], cur * sign]
      end
      idx = idx + 1
      in_num = false
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_num
  if idx == 0
    nums = [cur * sign, 0]
  else
    nums = [nums[0], cur * sign]
  end
  idx = idx + 1
end
let a = nums[0]
let b = nums[1]
let r = a * a + b * b
println("r=#{r}")
